title: Live runner provided no meaningful heartbeat while work was in progress
description: During live dogfooding runs, the CLI left the operator waiting at `runner_started` for minutes without useful command or phase feedback, making it hard to distinguish slow execution from a hang.
reproductionNotes: Run a live `codex-cli` task with `pnpm gdh run ... --runner codex-cli` and observe the gap between `runner.started` and the eventual final state.
suspectedCause: The live progress surface records too little intermediate runner information for operator-facing summaries.
